case_title: CHRISTOPHER CLEMENT BERGGREN VS. TRANS UNION LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT)**GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO FEB-03-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER CLEMENT BERGGREN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, ORALLY AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FOR DEFENDANT REPRESENTED BY MARY KAPETANAKIS (SPECIALIST I, LEGAL OPERATIONS). CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE: THE PRENTICE-HALL CORPORATION SYSTEM, INC.] FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERGGREN, CHRISTOPHER CLEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BERGGREN, CHRISTOPHER CLEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER CLEMENT BERGGREN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DEEMED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON NOV-08-22 IS INVALID, NAME ON PERSON WHO SIGNED THE CERTIFIED CARD IS NOT LISTED AS AN AUTHORIZED AGENT FOR SERVICE. COURT FINDS CLAIM IS OF FEDERAL LAW. SMALL CLAIMS DOESN'T HAVE JURISDICTION WITH FEDERAL CASE. COURT ORDERS CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE: THE PRENTICE-HALL CORPORATION SYSTEM, INC.] SERVED NOV-02-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRANS UNION LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERGGREN, CHRISTOPHER CLEMENT
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
